title: Making electro-competent cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d1c7s","text":"This protocol can be used for obtaining of electro-competent bacterial cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Streak the cells on LB agar plates and incubate at 37 °C for 12:00:00
Pick single colony and inoculate it in 20 mL 2X LB broth and incubate at 37 °C for 12:00:00 - 16:00:00 on shaker incubator
Take 2ml of primary inoculum and inoculate it in 200 mL 2X LB broth and incubate it at 37 °C on shaker.
Aliquot in 50 mL falcon and spin at 4000 rpm, 4 °C, 25 minutes
Discard the supernatant and resuspend well in 40 mL 10% glycerol
Discard the supernatant and resuspend in 25 mL 10% glycerol
Discard the supernatant and resuspend in 20 mL 10% glycerol. Mix the contents of 2 falcons together such that only 2 falcons of 40 mL contents is present
Discard the supernatant and resuspend in 1 mL 10% glycerol.
Make aliquots of 50 µL in autoclaved 600 µL eppendorfs,flash freeze and store at -80 °C
creator: Ashwinuday
